title: cochlearia officinalis subsp. integrifolia
intro: Cochlearia officinalis subsp. integrifolia, also known as the single-leaved scurvy grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help with digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Cochlearia officinalis subsp. integrifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
